MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff BD Thaakor dba Bristol Hotel is present. Represented by Kris Miranda, pro per.
Defendant Sarah Katherine Stanley is present.
Attorney Jason Gettleman representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-12-2011 is vacated.
